top_signals.title: Stocks, Bonds Fall as Traders Boost Fed-Hike Bets: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks fell and bond yields rose after the Federal Reserve decided to stay on hold, while signaling the possibility of higher interest rates as the central bank assesses the impacts of the Iran war on inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed's Warsh 'Destined to Disappoint' Trump, JPMorgan's Michele Says
top_signals.summary: "We have to accept the economy is in pretty good shape," Bob Michele, JPMorgan Asset Management's global head of fixed income, says during an interview on "Bloomberg Surveillance: The Fed Decides." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Long Shadow of the Iran War
top_signals.summary: Trump’s most consequential foreign policy mistake.
